title: metastelma hamatum
intro: Metastelma hamatum, also known as the 'Screw-pine' or 'Screw-palm', is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Metastelma hamatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
